events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: 79 years young and still a guitar god. What's your favourite Brian May riff?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' iconic frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Enduring Icon
angles.copy: Still got the moves at 83! Happy birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger.

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: MTV launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first music video.

angles.name: Radio Star Lives On
angles.copy: 45 years since MTV launched with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. The irony isn't lost on us. We're still here!

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. A true Britpop game-changer that still sounds massive.

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Festival of Music & Art began on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million gathered for three days of peace, love, and music at Woodstock. What a moment in history.

events.title: 49 years since the passing of Elvis Presley
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the King of Rock and Roll, passed away on this day in 1977. He would have been 91.

angles.name: King's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the King today, 49 years since we lost Elvis Presley. His music lives on.

events.title: 30 years since the passing of Tupac Shakur
events.blurb: Rapper Tupac Shakur passed away on this day in 1996 in Las Vegas. He would have been 55.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Legend
angles.copy: 30 years ago, we lost a true icon. Remembering Tupac Shakur and his unparalleled impact on music and culture.

events.title: 56 years since the passing of Jimi Hendrix
events.blurb: Guitar virtuoso Jimi Hendrix passed away on this day in 1970. He would have been 84.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Remembering the master of the electric guitar, Jimi Hendrix, who left us 56 years ago today. Still unmatched.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Crossing
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most famous in history.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Rock Legend
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the formidable Chrissie Hynde! A true rock and roll icon.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Mad For It
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. Still bringing the rock and roll swagger.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' turns 51 (UK single release)
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released in the UK on this day in 1975.

angles.name: Timeless Anthem
angles.copy: 51 years since John Lennon's 'Imagine' became a worldwide anthem. Its message of peace still resonates today.

events.title: The first iPod was released 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple released the first-generation iPod on this day in 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: Music in Your Pocket
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? 25 years ago today, Apple changed how we listened to music forever. Thousands of songs in your pocket!

events.title: It's James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th marks James Bond Day, celebrating the premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! What's your favourite Bond theme song? Ours is... well, we can't pick just one.

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: The visionary musician and peace activist John Lennon would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Imagine John
angles.copy: Remembering the legendary John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. Forever an inspiration.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: British comedy legend John Cleese celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Icon
angles.copy: Happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Python to Fawlty Towers, a true master of British comedy.

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' turns 58
events.blurb: The Beatles released their self-titled double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', on this day in 1968.

angles.name: Double Album Classic
angles.copy: 58 years since The Beatles delivered the sprawling masterpiece that is 'The White Album'. So much to unpack in there.
